name: seylan-status
description: Real-time status monitor for the SeylanHub backend. Checks health of all API services including wallet, loans, chat, TTS, and business endpoints.
examples: what's the status of the seylan backend?
check if the wallet service is up
show me the seylan service health

endpoints./status: Full status report for all SeylanHub services
endpoints./check/{service}: Check a specific service: health, wallet, loans, mock
